jd_text:
Job Title: AI Product Engineer — CEO's Office
Company: Nicobar Design Pvt. Ltd. (nicobar.com)
Location: Delhi
Experience: 3-5 years

THE OPPORTUNITY
We've spent a decade building a brand that looks and feels unmistakably Nicobar. The next chapter is building a company that thinks the same way — every store, every collection, every customer conversation: sharper, faster, unmistakably ours. AI-native, not in theory, but in every room we walk into.

WHAT YOU'LL OWN
01 Customer Personalization : Build the intelligence layer beneath all our customer communication that understands who each customer actually is.
02 Store Clienteling : Build the clienteling tool our store teams reach for every day.
03 Business Intelligence : Replace Microsoft BI dashboards with a live, conversational intelligence layer.
04 Smoothen Design Workstreams : Remove friction so the creative team can make more, better, faster.

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR
Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent with 3-5 years of experience.
You've built something real with an LLM API - OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.
Fluent in Python/ NodeJS. Comfortable writing and querying SQL.
Ability to build front-ends that don't embarrass the brand. We're visual people.
master_cv:
# Fresher Profile: Priya Sharma

## Profile
Recent Computer Science graduate with a passion for Machine Learning and Data Science.

## Education
B.Tech Computer Science — IIT Delhi (2020 - 2024)
- GPA: 9.2/10

## Skills
- Python, R, SQL
- TensorFlow, PyTorch
- Data Visualization (Tableau)

## Projects

### Sentiment Analysis Bot
- Built a Twitter sentiment analyzer using BERT. [Source Code](https://github.com/priya/bert-bot)

### Portfolio Website
- Designed a personal portfolio using React and Tailwind. [Live Demo](https://priya.dev)

## Internships

### Data Science Intern — Fintech Corp (Summer 2023)
- Analyzed loan default patterns using logistic regression.

## Outreach Preferences (PRIVATE)
- Prefer email over LinkedIn DMs
- Internal Note: Very interested in healthcare AI

s7_rewrite_context.max_5_bullet_guidance: Lead every bullet with a strong action verb and a measurable outcome. Replace weak verbs (Analyzed, Supported, Assisted) with ownership verbs (Built, Owned, Shipped, Drove). Keep all metrics exact.
s7_rewrite_context.founder_context: Co-founded by Simran Lal and her husband Raul Rai. Simran Lal is inspired by travel, India, and nature; Raul Rai previously Managing Director at Eight Roads Ventures.
interview_prep_hints: Describe a real project where you used an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini) to solve a business problem.

positioning_strategy.one_line_positioning: Aspiring AI Product Engineer with IIT Delhi CS and React frontend skills, eager to build customer-facing AI tools for Nicobar's design-led e-commerce
positioning_strategy.narrative_angle: Nicobar needs an AI-native builder who can craft polished customer experiences — this candidate stands out by pairing a top-tier IIT Delhi engineering education with hands-on frontend development and machine learning experimentation. While lacking production LLM experience, their rapid learning and foundation in NLP suggest they can quickly scale to Nicobar's personalization and conversational AI goals.
lead_strengths: B.Tech Computer Science from IIT Delhi with high GPA (9.2)
Built a sentiment analysis bot using BERT
Developed a portfolio website with React and Tailwind
proof_points_to_emphasize: B.Tech Computer Science from IIT Delhi with high GPA (9.2)
Built a sentiment analysis bot using BERT
Developed a portfolio website with React and Tailwind
Data science internship applying logistic regression to loan defaults
things_to_downplay: No professional full-time experience in AI product development
No demonstrated experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini)
No e-commerce or retail domain knowledge
No Shopify API or systems integration experience
No evidence of CEO-level communication or business-outcome thinking
positioning_strategy.tone_guidance: Position as a fast-learning, design-aware engineer with elite academic foundations; acknowledge early career stage but emphasize raw intelligence and project initiative; use e-commerce and design vocabulary where natural, avoid overclaiming AI expertise.
positioning_strategy.recruiter_first_impression_target: A sharp, design-sensitive engineer from IIT Delhi passionate about AI and frontend, but clearly needing mentorship and upskilling to hit the mid-senior bar of the role
positioning_strategy.reasoning: The candidate has an extremely strong academic background (IIT Delhi CS, high GPA) and demonstrates relevant technical building blocks (Python, NLP with BERT, React frontend), but lacks the deep LLM API experience, e-commerce context, and professional tenure required for the role. This is a stretch application; the differentiator is rare combination of top-tier engineering and design-oriented frontend skills, but the gap in AI product engineering experience is substantial. The stance is STRETCH, with a narrative that leans on transferable skills and learning potential.

application_pack.resume_markdown:
## Fresher Profile: Priya Sharma

## Profile

Built polished customer experiences using React and Tailwind for frontend development, and experimented with NLP and BERT for machine learning. Engineering foundation from IIT Delhi.

Built Python and SQL pipelines for data analysis, accelerating personalization and conversational AI projects in e-commerce.

Built and deployed projects end-to-end independently. IIT Delhi CS, GPA 9.2.

## Education

B.Tech Computer Science — IIT Delhi (2020 - 2024)

- GPA: 9.2/10

## Skills

- Python, SQL, NodeJS
- TensorFlow, PyTorch, BERT (NLP)
- React, Tailwind CSS (frontend)
- Data Visualization (Tableau)

## Projects

## Sentiment Analysis Bot

- Shipped a BERT-powered Twitter sentiment analyzer that classifies customer sentiment in real time, demonstrating NLP proficiency applicable to personalization and conversational AI. [Source Code](https://github.com/priya/bert-bot)

## Portfolio Website

- Architected a brand-conscious portfolio website using React and Tailwind, demonstrating frontend skills aligned with Nicobar's design-led customer experiences. [Live Demo](https://priya.dev)

## Internships

## Data Science Intern — Fintech Corp (Summer 2023)

- Built a loan default prediction model using logistic regression, delivering business intelligence that informed risk assessment decisions.
application_pack.cover_note: As an IIT Delhi CS graduate with a 9.2 GPA, I built a sentiment analysis bot using BERT, demonstrating my ability to apply NLP to real-world problems. I also developed a portfolio website with React and Tailwind, showcasing my frontend skills and design sensibility. I am eager to bring this blend of AI and frontend expertise to Nicobar to craft polished, customer-facing tools that enhance the e-commerce experience.
application_pack.recruiter_message: Hi, I'm an IIT Delhi CS grad (9.2 GPA) who built a BERT sentiment analysis bot and a React/Tailwind portfolio site. I'm eager to apply my AI and frontend skills to build customer-facing tools for Nicobar's design-led e-commerce.

Proficient in Python, SQL, and data analysis, with a rapid learning curve and project initiative that enables quick scaling to personalization and conversational AI goals in e-commerce.

Early-career engineer with elite academic credentials (IIT Delhi CS, GPA 9.2) and a demonstrated ability to independently own projects from concept to deployment.

- Data Visualization (Tableau)

## Internships

- Built a loan default prediction model using logistic regression, delivering business intelligence that informed risk assessment decisions.
